<!-- This is Genera Global instructions file, then inside instructios folder you can have repo specific instruction -->
It is simple demo on Javascript to show how to use github copilot.
use only html and javascript only.
use best practices and write clean code.
Do not use any framework or libraries.
Make sure the code is commented and easy to understand.
Make sure the code is well formatted and idented.
Make sure the code is well structured and organized.
